perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a close-up POV selfie shot of a woman with long brown hair talking to the camera in a badminton court. She gestures towards her friend sitting behind her on blue plastic chairs. (2) The scene cuts to her friend, a woman with black hair, who begins to change her top in the public seating area. She is seen pulling a black sports bra over her pink one and adjusting it while seated. Close-up shots focus on her hands and the movement of the garments. (3) The first woman reacts with a shocked expression, covering her mouth, as her friend continues adjusting her clothes. The video ends with both women looking directly into the camera lens together.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop music begins immediately. A female voice speaks in an excited, high-pitched tone in Mandarin. (2) The music continues at a steady pace as the female voice becomes more dramatic, accompanied by a sound effect (SFX) of a surprised exclamation. Ambient sounds of a sports hall, like distant ball strikes and shoe squeaks, are faint. (3) The vocal intensity peaks with a laugh and further commentary before the music and voices stop abruptly at the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '打羽毛球' (Playing badminton), '打到一半有人在這邊' (Halfway through, someone is here). Decorative Hook: '換衣服!!!' (Changing clothes!!!) in bright pink/yellow colors. (2) Hook Text: '而且是換內衣喲?' (And changing underwear?), 'Oh my god!!!', '這個要確定欸..?' (Is this for real..?), '直接從下面往上穿?' (Directly putting it on from the bottom up?). (3) Effect Text: '哇！！這18禁吧？？' (Wow!! Is this 18+??), '這不可能的...', '直接原地嚇到！！' (Immediately shocked!!), '這很正常吧？' (This is normal, right?). All text appears in stylized fonts with emotional emphasis.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Action (Changing clothes) -> Close-up Detail -> Reaction/Resolution

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female characters in foreground, 1 male figure playing badminton in the far background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Main creator has long brown hair and wears a black thin-strap camisole. The friend has black hair with bangs, initially wearing a white t-shirt, then a black Calvin Klein sports bra.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A row of light blue plastic stadium seats against a tall, solid mustard-yellow wall. The foreground shows the wooden flooring of a badminton court with nets visible in the distance.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Scandalous Action -> Reaction -> Punchline
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is designed for social media entertainment, utilizing a 'shock value' narrative. It captures a supposedly spontaneous and 'taboo' moment of a woman changing her undergarments in a public sports venue to engage viewers through humor, surprise, and the contrast between the public setting and private action.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Clear and frequent close-ups of the Calvin Klein logo on the sports bra waistband during the changing sequence.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy Mandarin vlog style with frequent colorful text hooks.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on the 'eye-catching' nature of the friend changing clothes to drive engagement, typical of short-form attention-economy content.
